title: Outpace
html:
Apple-Health-connected step-tracker that delivers a daily 9PM iMessage-style leaderboard to your friend group. Auto-discovers contacts, winner picks tomorrow's background, freemium ($4.99/mo premium) with skill-based step-challenge entry fees + cosmetic IAPs. Ships under the vrtlpirates.com umbrella alongside Vrtl Bet. Yahir's longest-running stealth-apps thread — first sketched in passing notes 2022, formalized as a PRD in Nov 2025, in active iOS-feel polish through April 2026.

TL;DR

  • Daily 9PM iMessage leaderboard is the core product loop. Friction-low because it lives in the messaging layer users already check.
  • Monetization stack: $4.99/mo premium tier + skill-based step-challenge entry fees + cosmetic IAPs (Nov 2025 PRD).
  • 10DLC SMS compliance via Telnyx + CTIA verification + toll free verification is the hardest infrastructure leg.
  • Polish bar: Apple Design Award standard (2026 03 04 outpace doc polish note) — explicit benchmark for SwiftUI implementation.
  • Submitted to the CV cohort as a portfolio project.
  • Sister to Vrtl Bet under VRTL Pirates — same monetization-via-friend-group instinct.

Key facts

  • Auto-contact discovery. Friction reduction is the primary product principle — no friend-list-building.
  • Winner picks tomorrow's background. The cosmetic-as-prize loop. Game-theoretic incentive without cash payout.
  • Brand colors. Apple-centric light blue, black, white. Fits inside the Apple aesthetic so the iMessage integration feels native.
  • VRTL Pirates umbrella. Same parent org as Vrtl Bet — the consumer-app cluster Yahir runs in parallel to rankett / insight ai.
  • Pre-PRD sketches. 2024 12 28 ideas, 2024 01 16 WagerWrld Betting with the Boys App, 2022 05 06 to do all carry the seed of "monetize the friend group" before Outpace got named.
  • Health-data thinking origin. 2025 09 08 logging health data naviwell is the conceptual ancestor — logging health data as a primitive.

Chronological arc

  • 2022 — pre-thinking (2022 05 06 to do — wager-with-friends doodles).
  • 2024 — name-adjacent sketches (2024 01 16 WagerWrld Betting with the Boys App, 2024 12 28 ideas).
  • 2025-09 → 2025-11 — concept consolidation. 2025 09 06 screenshot 2025 09 06 at 2 48 59 pm 667d3323, 2025 09 08 logging health data naviwell, 2025 09 09 screenshot 2025 09 09 at 9 59 02 pm 42ab2e5b, 2025 09 10 screenshot 2025 09 09 at 10 18 50 pm 68898278, 2025 10 09 screenshot 2025 10 09 at 12 16 22 pm 1b46a861, 2025 10 22 screenshot 2025 10 22 at 7 51 16 pm 77463179.
  • 2025-11-15 — full PRD. Monetization, marketing, 10DLC compliance all spec'd.
  • 2025-11-20 → 2025-12 — build sprint screenshots (2025 11 20 screenshot 2025 11 20 at 6 03 11 pm 3782e3eb, 2025 10 30 screenshot 2025 10 30 at 7 51 57 pm b5317e6a, 2025 10 31 screenshot 2025 10 31 at 10 58 43 am a276ba4f, 2025 11 04 screenshot 2025 11 04 at 9 26 47 am 5d5b4982).
  • 2026-03-04 — Apple Design Award benchmark set.
  • 2026-04-25 — submitted to CV cohort.
